rect.style: stroke: none; stroke-width: 1; stroke-dasharray: none; stroke-linecap: butt; stroke-dashoffset: 0; stroke-linejoin: miter; stroke-miterlimit: 4; fill: rgb(48,210,197); fill-rule: nonzero; opacity: 1; visibility: hidden;

path.style: stroke: rgb(48,210,197); stroke-width: 0; stroke-dasharray: none; stroke-linecap: butt; stroke-dashoffset: 0; stroke-linejoin: miter; stroke-miterlimit: 4; fill: rgb(48,210,197); fill-rule: nonzero; opacity: 1;
